LanguageData.AM_BlockedStairsX.description: An inaccessible staircase piled with debris. Entirely inaccessible.
LanguageData.AM_BlockedStairsX.label: blocked staircase
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Bunker.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Bunker.label: Ancient staircase
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_CommercialStreet.description: A stopped escalator, its destination unknown.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_CommercialStreet.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Mall_A.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Mall_A.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Mall_B.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Mall_B.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_ReserveBunker.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_ReserveBunker.label: Ancient staircase
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Shelter.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Shelter.label: Ancient staircase
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Subway.description: A stopped escalator, its destination unknown.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_Subway.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_DoubleElevator.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_DoubleElevator.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Elevator.description: A stopped escalator, its destination unknown.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Elevator.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Staircase.label: Ancient staircase
